Join

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know

The program is designed for students with a high school level who are entering EPFL. If you have significant gaps, the program will help you fill them. If you already have a good level, it will strengthen your knowledge.

Plan for about 5 to 10 hours per week depending on your pace. You can progress at your own speed, but we recommend regularity to properly absorb the concepts.

Each week, we organize a live session on Zoom. On the agenda: correction of the week's exercises, additional explanations, and your questions. Sessions are recorded if you can't attend.

Private tutoring is an additional option for those who want individual support. You work directly with a tutor on your specific difficulties. Contact us to learn more about rates.

Zoom sessions are recorded and available for replay. You can also ask your questions in writing and we'll answer them during the next session or by message.

The program is designed for the summer before EPFL starts, typically from June to September. We recommend starting as early as possible to have time to properly absorb the content.

Encore des questions ?

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter, nous serons ravis de vous répondre.

Nous contacterVoir les tarifs
Caerus

Summer preparation program for future EPFL students.
